episode.title: TOURIST TRAP
episode.description: When Ben changes into an alien to play a prank on a lame town filled with cheesy tourist exhibits, he accidentally releases Megawhatt, a mischievous and destructive creature made of electrical energy.

episode.title: HUNTED
episode.description: When Vilgax sends three expert alien bounty hunters to recover the prototype, Ben finds himself facing his toughest challenge yet.

episode.title: PERMANENT RETIREMENT
episode.description: Grandpa, Gwen and Ben visit an elderly relative only to find that her retirement community has been overrun by shapeshifting aliens known as Limax.

episode.title: THE KRAKKEN
episode.description: Ben has a chance encounter with a sea monster called a Krakken. Initially, Max and Gwen don't believe him, but when the Krakken attacks, Ben must use his aquatic form, Ripjaws, to set things right.

episode.title: WASHINGTON, B.C.
episode.description: Ben must battle the mad scientist Dr. Animo and stop him from running rampant in Washington, D.C. with an invention that can reanimate dinosaurs and mutate normal animals into monsters.

episode.title: AND THEN THERE WERE 10
episode.description: Ben Tennyson is a normal 10-year-old boy on a summer road trip with his Grandpa Max and cousin Gwen until he finds a mysterious device that allows him to change into 10 different alien heroes.

episode.title: READY TO RUMBLE
episode.description: Ben enters an "ultimate wrestling competition" as Four Arms and becomes an instant celebrity hit.

episode.title: GOODBYE AND GOOD RIDDANCE
episode.description: Summer's over and Ben is back at school. Unable to tell anyone about the Omnitrix, Ben suddenly realizes he's gone from a "hero" to a "zero", that is until Vilgax comes after him with a vengeance.

episode.title: DIVIDED WE STAND
episode.description: Ben discovers a new hero, Ditto, with the ability to multiply. These multiple Dittos can't agree on anything and drive Gwen crazy. But they must work together when Animo unleashes his army of replicants.

episode.title: GAME OVER
episode.description: When Ben and Gwen get zapped into a Sumo Slammers video game, Ben must deal with Gwen's superior gaming skills and defeat the game's shape-shifting über-villain to escape back into the real world.

collection.title: THE GRIM ADVENTURES OF BILLY & MANDY

episode.title: THE SECRET SNAKE CLUB
episode.description: Mandy joins the Secret Snake Club where they call forth an ancient entity to save nerds from persecution.

episode.title: SUBSTITUTE TEACHER
episode.description: Nergal Jr. starts school with Billy and Mandy and falls prey to Sperg's bullying. When the teacher won't protect him, Nergal Jr. steps up and teaches Sperg a lesson in respect.

episode.title: THE NERVE
episode.description: Billy steals Mandy's nerve to confront Sperg and Mandy learns that inner strength comes from within.

episode.title: THE BAD NEWS GHOULS
episode.description: Baseball gets scary when Grim brings in some dead ringers to help Billy and Irwin defeat Mindy's team.

episode.title: COMPLETE AND UDDER CHAOS
episode.description: Eris has vowed to give up chaos, leading Billy, Mandy and Grim into temptation.

episode.title: SUPER ZEROS
episode.description: Billy becomes a super hero, leaving Grim to deal with Billy's inept father.

episode.title: HOUSE OF PAIN
episode.description: Lord Pain comes from the Plane of Eternal Suffering to serve Grim, who turns out not to be worthy.

episode.title: SAMSON NEEDS A HUG
episode.description: Who's hugging everyone at camp against their will? Lazlo turns sleuth to find that the culprit is wearing his shoes.

episode.title: S IS FOR THE CRAZY
episode.description: A jellyfish attached to Samson's head sends Samson into an electrically charged fit of craziness where the sky is the limit.

episode.title: BAD LUCK BE A CAMPER TONIGHT
episode.description: After Samson's "bad luck" mysteriously gets transferred to Lazlo, Lazlo has to appeal to the "Scoutmaster in the Sky" for divine intervention.

episode.title: HAROLD & RAJ
episode.description: Harold tries a little too hard to impress his new best friend Raj.

episode.title: CAVE CHATTER
episode.description: Samson finally finds someone who will listen to him; the only problem is it's a frozen caveman.

episode.title: CAMP SAMSON
episode.description: When Samson feels left out from the group, he is determined to make them all remember him...somehow!

episode.title: SCOOP OF THE DAY
episode.description: Lumpus becomes obsessed with reading Dave and Ping Pong's newspaper even though it is "for campers only."

episode.title: TAKING CARE OF GRETCHEN
episode.description: Afraid of Gretchen, Lazlo hires Samson to "take care of her" for him, but he is mortified to learn from a mob movie what that actually means!

episode.title: THE BEAN TREE
episode.description: When Lumpus discovers that he and Lazlo are related, he reluctantly decides to leave camp Kidney to his least favorite camper.

episode.title: SPACEMATES
episode.description: Nina is disgusted to learn that the Dung Beetles are her soul mates, but has a change of heart when they build her a rocket ship made from dung.

episode.title: DIRT NAPPERS
episode.description: Samson becomes so obsessed with keeping the camp clean that he sucks all the dirt up causing the Dung Beetles to fall asleep...possibly forever!

episode.title: SWEET DREAM BABY
episode.description: Lumpus is forced to invite the Jellies for a sleepover and he gets no sleep at all!

episode.title: CREEPY CRAWLY CAMPY
episode.description: Raj befriends an insect with an elephant shaped head and grosses the other campers out.

episode.title: SQUIRREL SEATS
episode.description: Patsy hatches a plan to sit next to Lazlo on the bus and it sends the Bean Scouts into a tailspin.

episode.title: HARD DAYS SAMSON
episode.description: The Squirrel Scouts mistake Samson for their favorite teen idol and hunt him down like he was one of the Beatles.

episode.title: THE BIG WEIGH IN
episode.description: When Lumpus becomes obsessed with catching a turkey-doodle, Lazlo does everything he can to save his favorite kind of bird.

episode.title: HOT SPRING FEVER
episode.description: Raj and Samson fight over a secret hot spring only to end up shriveling up like raisins from soaking in it too long.

episode.title: THERE'S NO PLACE LIKE GNOME
episode.description: When Edward gets a strange bite, he discovers that it's not from an ordinary mosquito. In fact, it may be from a wood gnome!

episode.title: I'VE NEVER BEAN IN A SUB
episode.description: The Jellies want a submarine for the lake and try to raise the money to buy one.

episode.title: THE BATTLE OF PIMPLEBACK MOUNTAIN
episode.description: The Jellies rip a hole in Lumpus' prized tent and will do anything to keep Lumpus from discovering the secret.

episode.title: OVERCOOKED BEAN
episode.description: On the hottest day of the year, an air conditioner falls from the sky and brings out the worst in the campers at Camp Kidney.

episode.title: HELLO DOLLY
episode.description: Edward will stop at nothing to prevent the Jellies from discovering he has a doll.

episode.title: HANDY HELPER
episode.description: Lumpus desperately needs to earn his handy helper badge so he "helps" Lazlo become more like him.

episode.title: PARENTS DAY
episode.description: When the Jellies discover that Lumpus' parents did not come to visit him at Camp, they try to set things right.

episode.title: BALL OF REVENGE
episode.description: The Farmer is in an exceptionally bitter mood, taking note of all the attention Muriel gives to Courage. He decides to get rid of Courage forever when Muriel gives Courage a colorful new blanket that the Farmer assumed she was knitting for him.

episode.title: CAJUN GRANNY STEW
episode.description: A fox cooks up a delicious "Cajun Granny Stew" to enter in a cooking contest, but he's missing one ingredient: the Granny. Now Courage must save Muriel from ending up in the pot.

episode.title: A NIGHT AT THE KATZ MOTEL
episode.description: Muriel, Eustace and Courage check into a motel run by a sinister cat named Katz. It turns out to be a VERY long night when Katz turns his spiders loose on them.

episode.title: WRATH OF THE LIBRARIAN
episode.description: While digging up "treasures" he'd buried in the yard, Courage finds a library book that is two years overdue. He takes it back and learns he owes several thousand dollars in overdue fees.

episode.title: CABARET COURAGE
episode.description: While sightseeing in Hollowood, California, the Family is swallowed by what appears to be a giant stomach. Courage must perform to rescue Muriel and the Farmer before they are digested.

episode.title: FOOD OF THE DRAGON
episode.description: A large dragon arrives at the Farmhouse looking for food. It attacks the house and occupies it, eats the Farmer as a snack, and sets aside Muriel and Courage for dinner.

episode.title: AQUA-FARMER
episode.description: After losing a swimming contest to a dolphin, the Farmer becomes obsessed with winning. The Farmer challenges the dolphin to a re-match, offering Muriel as the prize if he loses.

episode.title: BRIDE OF THE SWAMP MONSTER
episode.description: When the Swamp Monster finds Muriel's lost locket, he vows to find her and make her his bride

episode.title: THE WINDMILL VANDALS
episode.description: The farm's windmill jams, and when Courage tries to fix it, he finds strange symbols carved on each of the blades. Soon after, ghosts of saber-wielding vandals apear, galloping straight for the farm!

episode.title: LE QUACK BALLOON
episode.description: Le Quack returns with a scheme to use Muriel to steal money from the Piggy Bank of Sweden. Courage must find a way to save her.

episode.title: RUMPLEDKILTSKIN
episode.description: Muriel is summoned to Scotland by her uncle to weave the family tartan, but upon arrival she learns that he is an imposter. He imprisons her and forces her to weave thousands of kilts.

episode.title: THE NUTCRACKER
episode.description: The Family browses in a junkyard and accidentally gets locked in. As evening falls, evil rats capture Muriel and The Farmer, and prepare to cook them for a feast. Courage must save them and himself.

episode.title: A BEAVER'S TAIL
episode.description: The Family awakens one morning and discovers a lake outside their home. When the water rises and begins to flood the farmhouse, Courage reluctantly goes to find the cause.

episode.title: COURAGE UNDER THE VOLCANO
episode.description: While on an island vacation, Muriel is abducted by an ancient tribe to be offered as a human sacrifice to the volcano god. In order to save Muriel, Courage must go into the volcano and persuade the volcano god not to erupt.

episode.title: THE KING OF FLAN
episode.description: After seeing an infomercial, all of Nowhere, including Muriel and the Farmer, becomes obsessed with flan. Courage must track down the creator of this new "hypno-mercial," and de-hypnotize the town.

episode.title: ANGRY NASTY PEOPLE
episode.description: Tarantella returns and offers the Family roles in his new show "Angry Nasty People." All they have to do is act mean. They agree, and the Farmer shines as his nastiness is encouraged.

episode.title: MONDO MAGIC
episode.description: A magician arrives at the Farmhouse and begins transforming Muriel into a monster, intending to take her as his bride. Courage must find a way to reverse the spell before it's too late.

episode.title: FEAST OF THE BULLFROGS
episode.description: A warlike tribe of bullfrogs takes over the Farmhouse, forcing the Family to convert to Frogism, the belief that Frogs rule. Courage overhears their Emperor planning a feast of marinated human legs!

episode.title: TULIP'S WORM
episode.description: Courage befriends a giant worm that swallows Muriel and the Farmer, and then disappears into the earth. Courage must fly to a distant planet to find the worm's owner and save his family.

episode.title: COURAGE IN THE BIG STINKIN' CITY
episode.description: The Family goes to NYC and is immediately led astray by a crooked giant cockroach, who takes them hostage until Courage runs a dangerous "errand" for him.

episode.title: CURTAIN OF CRUELTY
episode.description: A bizarre phenomenon occurs, and the people of Nowhere become nasty and cruel. The Farmer flourishes in this environment, and is endorsed as the next mayor.

episode.title: KATZ UNDER THE SEA
episode.description: Muriel signs up to be the cook on a nuclear submarine. Courage discovers that the First Mate is a spy, working for a rival submarine manufacturer, with orders to sabotage the submarine.

episode.title: THE HOUSE OF DISCONTENT
episode.description: When they have nothing to offer it on the Harvest Moon, the farmhouse begins terrorizing the Family. Now it's up to Courage to appease the angry Spirit.

episode.title: MISSION TO THE SUN
episode.description: Courage and his family are selected by NASA to go on a dangerous space mission to save the Sun. While in flight, Muriel becomes infected with an alien bacterium that tries to sabotage the mission.

episode.title: THE HUMAN HABITRAIL
episode.description: A sinister salesman arrives at the Farm peddling vacuums. During his pitch, the salesman shrinks Muriel and the Farmer and sucks them up into his vacuum. Now Courage must find a way to rescue them.

episode.title: A DAD CARTOON
episode.description: When Dad sets out to wash his car, one thing after another goes wrong until it's a complete wreck.

episode.title: STREAKY CLEAN
episode.description: Dexter invents a cleaning device that removes clothing stains from space. But when the satellite is accidentally nudged to a higher setting, stains aren't the only things being removed.

episode.title: GOT YOUR GOAT
episode.description: Dee Dee shows Dexter a picture of the Chupacabra only to have him realize that it's Charlie, one of his biological mutations that has escaped. Dee Dee and Dexter fly to Puerto Rico to retrieve his pet.

episode.title: ULTRAJERK 2000
episode.description: When Dexter's new Ultrabot 2000 judges him to be inefficient, it decides to take control of the lab. Now Dexter must rely on Dee Dee to save the day.

episode.title: SURPRISE
episode.description: It's Dexter's birthday, and he's intent on sneaking a peek at his presents. In order to get around Mom, Dad and the ever-vigilant Dee Dee, he makes himself invisible.

episode.title: TECHNO TURTLE
episode.description: When Dee Dee rescues a wounded turtle from a hawk's talons, Dexter helps rebuild the little shelled animal into a bionic powerhouse.

episode.title: FRAMED
episode.description: When Dexter's glasses break, he is forced to get less dorky-looking frames and starts a new fashion trend at school.

episode.title: DAD IS DISTURBED
episode.description: Dad prepares to watch a special golf tournament on television. After setting up for an afternoon of sports, he's interrupted by Dexter, Dee Dee and Mom, who monopolize his space and the television.

episode.title: THAT'S USING YOUR HEAD
episode.description: Dexter meets up with a man who is trying to pick up radio signals through a handmade hat comprised of Styrofoam and trash.

episode.title: LAB ON THE RUN
episode.description: Dexter's robots escape from the lab and run amok in the city. They manage to get into loads of trouble until Dexter comes to save them in the Robo Dexo 2000.

episode.title: BOY NAMED SUE
episode.description: Mandark reveals that he was raised by New Age parents who disavowed science and named him Susan.

episode.title: PAPER ROUTE BOUT
episode.description: Dee Dee goes up against an efficient organization of paper delivery boys called the Paper Tigers who are out to steal her paper route.

episode.title: TRICK OR TREE HOUSE
episode.description: Someone is stealing all the wood in the house! Dexter is suspicious that his sister is building a secret tree house, so he decides to investigate.

episode.title: THE OLD SWITCHAROOMS
episode.description: Dad sentences Dee Dee and Dexter to go to each other's rooms for being bad. Dee Dee is fine with the notion, but Dexter is not. Dee Dee, after all, has the full run of his lab while Dexter's trapped in a cootie-filled girl's room!

episode.title: GOOEY ALIENS
episode.description: The glowing, globby alien life form that Dexter found in a meteorite gets loose and inhabits the brains of Mom, Dad, and Dee Dee, who all start building a communication device in Dexter's lab.

episode.title: BIG BOTS
episode.description: Dexter unwittingly helps Dee Dee build a huge robot that is better than his. Matters only get worse when both try to save a volcanic island from eruption.

episode.title: DEE DEE AND THE MAN
episode.description: Dexter is fed up with Dee Dee's prancing in his lab and fires her. He then starts interviewing candidates to replace her.

episode.title: AYE AYE EYES
episode.description: When Dexter returns a little girl's stuffed bunny to her, she falls in love with him. With the help of Dee Dee, Dexter is eventually able to divert the girl's affections toward another little boy.

episode.title: SPORTS A POPPIN'
episode.description: Dad tries to teach Dexter a sport, but Dexter is just horrible at every game. Dad finally gives up, unaware that Dexter has become engaged in an athletic battle with a monster from his lab.

episode.title: COUPON FOR CRAZINESS
episode.description: Dexter gets switched with his complete opposite, Dextor. Dexter thinks he's found his true family as Dextor's parents are scientists. Meanwhile, Dextor thoroughly enjoys Dexter's goofy family.

episode.title: DEXTER'S LAB: A STORY
episode.description: When Dexter takes in a lost Labrador Retriever, the boy genius decides that his greatest human experiment will be to break the communication barrier between canine and human.

episode.title: THE LAUGHING
episode.description: When Dexter gets bitten by a set of false teeth belonging to an old clown, he slowly becomes infected with clown's syndrome. At night, Dexter transforms into a clown and terrorizes the town.

episode.title: SISTER MOM
episode.description: When Dexter has to have a parent-principal meeting at school, the boy genius is afraid. Luckily he talks Dee Dee into changing her molecular structure so that she can go to the meeting in Mom's place.

episode.title: DIAL M FOR MONKEY: PELTRA
episode.description: When the evil Peltra spots Monkey, she desires his fur to make into clothing. Peltra kidnaps Monkey and Agent Honeydew, preparing to carry out her terrible plan.

episode.title: NAGGED TO ED
episode.description: The Eds are discovered by the Kanker sisters, who take them back to their mobile home, make them dinner and iron their undershirts. At first the Eds like it, but soon their patience wears thin.

episode.title: 3 SQUARES AND AN ED
episode.description: Ed has been grounded by his parents and can't leave his bedroom--unless Edd and Eddy can find a way to bust him out.

episode.title: IT CAME FROM OUTER ED
episode.description: Ed wants to do his own scam based on a comic book he's reading, but it turns into a day of horror for Edd and Eddy.

episode.title: HIGH HEELED EDS
episode.description: Ed, Edd and Eddy discover to their chagrin that all the boys in the neighborhood are away at the go-cart races. All that's left is girls--and Jimmy. Eddy must adapt his scams to feminine desires.

episode.title: HOT BUTTERED ED
episode.description: Ed, Edd and Eddy wake up early so they can be the first ones at the swimming hole. But when they arrive, they find that all the good spots are taken. Eddy resolves to scam his way to a better spot.

episode.title: HOME COOKED EDS
episode.description: Eddy finds the Kanker sisters' trailer parked on his lawn for their family vacation. The girls invade Ed, Edd and Eddy's lives, and Eddy resolves to find the Kankers a new holiday spot.

episode.title: INFERNAL SLUMBER
episode.description: Bloo and the gang show up at Mac's apartment for a slumber party.

episode.title: PARTYING IS SUCH SWEET SOIREE
episode.description: When Mac tries to stop Bloo's secret party from happening, Bloo tempts Mac with his one weakness: sugar.

episode.title: HICCY BURP
episode.description: Bloo gets a mean case of the hiccups. Will he be able to get rid of them before the big Imaginary Friend Pageant?

episode.title: STORE WARS
episode.description: It's Madame Foster's birthday! But when Frankie tries to take a simple trip to the mall, Bloo and the gang tag along and are this caregiver's worst nightmare.

episode.title: CARNY CRAZY
episode.description: The carnival comes to school, and while Jake and his animal buddies enjoy everything it has to offer, Adam becomes totally obsessed with winning a cheesy Princess Ballerina Snow Globe.

episode.title: LUPE IN LOVE
episode.description: Lupe falls in love with Orlando Parrot, a bird who tells her all the things she likes to hear. Sadly for Lupe, the only "Pretty Bird" Orlando fancies is his own reflection in the mirror.

episode.title: JAKE'S DAY OFF
episode.description: Jake spends his day off from school - at school, enjoying all the facilities without those annoying classes getting in the way, and he persuades Adam to join him.

episode.title: THE TWO JAKES
episode.description: Adam is surprised to learn that Jake has made a clone of not only himself but of Adam as well. But Adam and Jake soon find out that clones might be more trouble than they're worth.

episode.title: AIN'T TOO PROUD TO EGG
episode.description: In a school assignment designed to teach responsibility, Adam, Jake and the gang are given eggs to care for. But when the eggs hatch, Adam realizes fatherhood is more than it's cracked up to be!

episode.title: THE MAGIC FISH
episode.description: Adam rescues a stranded fish and is granted a magic "fish wish". He dismisses the wish as foolish nonsense but quickly discovers his animal pals think differently, and they want Adam to use his wish on them.

episode.title: LEAF OF ABSENCE
episode.description: While Principal Pixiefrog takes some time off, his replacement, Principal Wolverine, makes things miserable for the students. Now it's up to Adam and Jake to get their favorite frog back.

episode.title: POOP SCOOP
episode.description: The school paper is closing down since no one reads it. When Adam suggests they write an issue that people will want to read, the others take this to mean one thing-gossip!

episode.title: NICE MUSTACHE
episode.description: When Jake wakes up one day with a big, bushy mustache, his whole world changes, and he decides to leave school to follow his mustache wherever it leads him.

episode.title: DISREGARDING HENRY
episode.description: Jake mistakes Henry Armadillo's poor singing for talent and quickly enters him into the school talent show and books a TV gig. Can Adam stop them before Henry makes a fool of himself on national TV?

episode.title: COOL KIDS
episode.description: While taking polar classes in the refrigerated part of the school, Jake falls in with a crowd of "cool kids" and completely forgets Adam and the rest of his old friends.

episode.title: THE TIMES, THEY ARE EXCHANGIN'
episode.description: During an exchange program, Adam goes back to his old school and realizes things aren't exactly as he remembers them. Jake joins him and has trouble distinguishing Adam from the other humans.

episode.title: BASIC JAKE
episode.description: When Adam accidentally draws a Saturday detention from Pixiefrog, he discovers that Jake gets detention every weekend so he can get out of the zoo and do his very own basic cable variety show.

episode.title: CHEER PRESSURE
episode.description: After a cheerleader is injured, the Charles Darwin Jungle Squad recruits a reluctant Adam to cheer with them at the extreme cheerleading finals.

episode.title: I GOT A NEW ATTITUDE
episode.description: After receiving disappointing results from their career tests, Jake and Adam go on a quest to find their true destiny.

episode.title: LE SWITCHEROO
episode.description: After Coach Gills blows a fuse over Adam's poor performance in gym class, Mr. Mandrill suggests Adam and Coach Gills switch roles in order to appreciate one another's challenges.

episode.title: UP ALL NIGHT
episode.description: Adam's thrilled when Kerry invites him to play paintball early the next morning. But he finds it impossible to get any sleep when Jake, Windsor and Slips show up for a sleepover the night before.

episode.title: SHE'S KOALA THAT
episode.description: Ignoring warnings from his pals, Adam befriends a sad little koala named Deidre. When Adam finds out she really is a depressing drag, Jake and Lupe step in to help by giving Deidre a makeover.

episode.title: SUPPLIES PARTY
episode.description: When his human friends and animal friends both show up for his birthday bash at the local pizza palace, Adam has to find ways to keep the two groups apart or risk embarrassing himself.

episode.title: DOCU-TRAUMA
episode.description: When a nature documentary filmmaker comes to Charles Darwin Middle School, she focuses on Adam, thinking he's some sort of freakish missing link.

episode.title: TWO TONS OF FUN
episode.description: After discovering a stash of Mr. Hornbill's unsent love letters to Mrs. Tusk, Adam and Jake agree to coach the painfully shy Mr. H in wooing the cafeteria lady of his dreams.

episode.title: THE "A" WORD
episode.description: After Adam describes someone as "going ape," Jake grows very quiet before running off bawling. Thinking that he must've insulted Jake, Adam tries to make things right with his monkey pal.

episode.title: CHEW ON THIS
episode.description: Adam's complaint about the cafeteria causes a lawsuit-fearing Principal Pixiefrog to replace all of the usual lunches with human food. Unfortunately, the animals like this new food a little too much.

episode.title: IMPEACH FUZZ
episode.description: When Fuzzy Lumpkins throws his hat into the mayoral ring and claims a surprise victory, it's up to the Mayor and the Girls to wrestle the office (and the Mayor's actual hat) back from him.

episode.title: CAT MAN DO
episode.description: Bubbles saves a seemingly innocent kitty from the clutches of an evil villain. But when the Girls discover it's actually the Cat who is evil, they must save the Professor from being the next victim.

episode.title: FUZZY LOGIC
episode.description: Beastly bumpkin Fuzzy Lumpkins goes wild in Townsville and only the Powerpuff Girls - with some help from a flying squirrel - can teach him to respect other people's property.

episode.title: THE ROWDYRUFF BOYS
episode.description: Mojo Jojo creates the ultimate weapons against the Powerpuff Girls - boy equivalents! Enter Butch, Boomer and Brick: The Rowdyruff Boys.

episode.title: GESHUNDFIGHT
episode.description: The Amoeba Boys' ill-conceived plan to stand in Townsville Park all night in the rain leaves them with a nasty virus that's really something to sneeze at.

episode.title: PASTE MAKES WASTE
episode.description: When Buttercup's taunting turns paste-eating classmate Elmer Sglue into a destructive Paste Monster, she gets out of a sticky situation by doing something against her tough nature--apologizing.

episode.title: CANDY IS DANDY
episode.description: When the Mayor gives the Girls some candy in gratitude for saving the day, they become hooked on the stuff. They even make a deal with a local villain to commit crimes for treats.

episode.title: SLUMBERING WITH THE ENEMY
episode.description: When the Girls decide to have an all-girl slumber party, a villain decides to crash it. To what lengths will this villain go to keep his identity hidden?

episode.title: OCTI EVIL
episode.description: The heinous Him toys with Bubbles' mind by speaking to her through Octi, her favorite stuffed animal. Following Him's orders, Bubbles picks a fight with her sisters that lands them all in a time-out.

episode.title: MOMMY FEAREST
episode.description: When Professor Utonium falls for the lovely Ima Goodlady, the Girls quickly discover that Ima's not such a good lady after all. She's really the sinister Sedusa!

episode.title: JEWEL OF THE AISLE
episode.description: A crook hides a huge diamond in a box of the Girls' favorite cereal. How can he trick the Girls into giving him some cereal in order to get the jewel back?

episode.title: POWERPUFF BLUFF
episode.description: Three local hoods get new identities when they find grown-up-sized Powerpuff costumes inside Townsville Jail. They terrorize Townsville while the Mayor mistakenly sends the real Girls to the slammer.

episode.title: INSECT INSIDE
episode.description: Vile villain Roach Coach has a plan to infest Townsville with an army of cockroaches! The Girls overcome their squirms to squash Roach Coach's scheme and force him to bug off.

episode.title: BUBBLE BOY
episode.description: Realizing that the only way to beat the Rowdyruff Boys is to join them, Bubbles takes Boomer's place in this rough-and-tumble band of boys.

episode.title: LYING AROUND THE HOUSE
episode.description: The Girls tell little white lies that turn into a big, bad problem.

episode.title: SHOTGUN WEDDING
episode.description: The Professor tries to find out what a Lumpkins really is.

episode.title: BURGLAR ALARMED
episode.description: A new burglar comes to Townsville and his first robbery is at the house of...the Powerpuff Girls?

episode.title: DIVIDE AND CONQUER
episode.description: When the Amoeba Boys learn how to divide, they multiply...wreaking havoc as the many amoebas descend upon Townsville.

episode.title: MONKEY SEE, DOGGY DO
episode.description: Mojo unleashes a curse on Townsville that turns everyone into dogs, including the Powerpuff Girls! Luckily, they manage to sniff out a solution and show Mojo that their bite is worse than his bark.

episode.title: FORCED KIN
episode.description: A terrible, evil menace from outer space descends upon Townville. The Girls must fight evil with evil, so they seek the advice of Mojo Jojo.

episode.title: STRAY BULLET
episode.description: In order to save an innocent squirrel, Bubbles gives him a dash of Chemical X, giving him some super squirrel powers.

episode.title: NANO OF THE NORTH
episode.description: It's raining in Townville, but this is more than just rain. These drops are actually microscopic robots tearing apart the city, and the Girls must find a way to fight them on their own level.

episode.title: SUPER FRIENDS
episode.description: The new girl next door learns it's hard to be best friends with superheroes and soon starts hanging out with the wrong kind of kid: Princess.

episode.title: MORE FLOWER TO YOU
episode.description: When Rodney kills Mr. J's prized flowers the night before a big flower show, he and Andy make outlandish promises to the plants so they'll stay healthy.

episode.title: DON'T CROSS HERE
episode.description: When Elmer Gridlock, the old crossing guard, retires, Andy thinks he's qualified to take over. But he'll have to pass a series of tests against Jack Royal first.

episode.title: STRANGER THAN FRICTION
episode.description: Andy and Salty Mike discover that they have the same weird hobby and start hanging out together. Jealous, Rodney and Kyle decide that teaming up is the only way to get their best friends back.

episode.title: MY BRAND NEW SALTY MIKE
episode.description: When Salty Mike is accidentally sold to mysterious Ms. Nasenpickel, who has a tragic history with pets, Kyle blames Andy and claims Rodney as his new pet.

episode.title: TREEHOUSE BROKEN
episode.description: Andy and Rodney challenge Kyle and Salty Mike to a treehouse building competition, and things get out of hand.

episode.title: THE GRIM CHEAPER
episode.description: Andy decides it's time to start saving for the future. But he takes Mr. J's lessons in thriftiness a little too seriously.

episode.title: FAMILY CRUDE
episode.description: When Mr. & Mrs. J leave town, Andy and Rodney must stay with Kyle and Salty Mike.

episode.title: FLATBOTTOM'S UP
episode.description: Andy and Rodney must clean Mrs. Flatbottom's slug room. Their zest for life is gone until she offers homemade lemonade. Now, they'll do anything so long as they get more of her delicious drink.

episode.title: TROUBLE DATE
episode.description: Rodney invites Darlene over for a date, and she agrees on the condition that Martha can tag along so she can photograph the Johnsons' "exotic" backyard.

episode.title: EDDIE OR NOT...
episode.description: Cousin Eddie visits Rodney to make amends for years of being a jerk. Rodney is smitten, but Andy is suspicious of Eddie's intentions. It could have something to do with the tough City Rats who come looking for Eddie.

episode.title: RODNEY DARLING
episode.description: Mr. J and Andy exclude Rodney from their club, so he hangs out with Mrs. J's ladies group. When Rodney becomes the darling of the ladies, Andy gets jealous and Mr. J gets tired of hearing about Rodney.

episode.title: WINNER FAKE ALL
episode.description: To boost his best chum's spirits, Rodney lets Andy win a round of their favorite game, Flying King Footloaf. But the victory goes to Andy's head and makes him think he can win at anything.

episode.title: SCREW-UP IN AISLE SIX
episode.description: When Andy has an allergic reaction to the food samples Rodney gave him, he bloats up like a giant beach ball. Now Rodney has to roll his friend back home without letting Mr. J know.

episode.title: HOLE IN THE STORY
episode.description: Andy and Rodney seek the advice of Grandpa Squirrel to get out of a dangerous dare. Grandpa Squirrel recounts an erratic, ancestral space adventure yarn that may or may not be true or helpful.

episode.title: FREAKY FUR DAY
episode.description: Andy thinks being a pet is easy. Rodney thinks being a pet owner is easy. To prove they're both wrong, they switch!

episode.title: BIRTHDAY BOY
episode.description: It's Andy's birthday, and wouldn't you know it, Rodney totally forgot! But why bother planning ahead for something like that when you can race around madly trying to make it right?

episode.title: THE ENDANGERED SPECIES TWIST
episode.description: To his delight, Rodney learns he's an endangered species, whose every whim must be catered to. To his dismay, Mr. J learns that Rodney is an endangered species, whose every whim must be catered to.

episode.title: THE TROJAN RABBIT
episode.description: Rodney really is the perfect pet, until the arrival of Archie, a rabbit who REALLY is the perfect pet. So perfect, in fact, that he makes Rodney ashamed enough to run away from home.

episode.title: THE GREATEST SCHMO ON EARTH
episode.description: Rodney's special time at the circus with Darlene is ruined by the arrival of his Cousin Eddie, who in addition to being arrogant and self-centered can also fly, which makes everyone adore him.

episode.title: WALL OF THE WILD
episode.description: When Rodney gets trapped in the walls of the house, Andy thinks he's run away from home. But he's actually running for his life from giant squirrel-eating spiders and a lunatic exterminator.

episode.title: WHAT'S SUNG IS SUNG
episode.description: Andy tries to bridge the gap between Rodney and his father through the timeless art of karaoke. Will the cutthroat neighborhood karaoke circuit finally create harmony or drive them further apart?

episode.title: SPEECHLESS
episode.description: Mr. J loses his voice the night before he's supposed to give an important speech. Will Rodney's voice-throwing plan save the speech, or will Mr. J end up looking like a dummy?

episode.title: ISLANDS IN THE STREET
episode.description: An accident strands Rodney on a deserted island with Salty Mike. They just may be able to live in peace together, if they can stop fighting each other first.

episode.title: POOL FOR LOVE
episode.description: Building a pool in the backyard would wreck Leon's tree, which is the last thing Rodney wants. That is, until a cute squirrel named Darlene wants to go swimming.

episode.title: JEALOUSY, JEALOUS DO
episode.description: It's spies, lies and jealous double agents in this exciting episode of Evil Con Carne.

episode.title: THE MOTHER OF ALL EVILS
episode.description: Would Hector lie to his mother? And would she still love him if she learned the truth?

episode.title: TEENAGE IDOL
episode.description: Hector recruits an ancient idol to help him conquer the world while Skarr makes friends with the natives.

episode.title: NO-NO NANUK
episode.description: Hector turns the world upside down in a polarizing quest to conquer all.

episode.title: COD VS. HECTOR
episode.description: When Hector and Cod are stranded on a deserted island, they must learn to work together in order to survive.

episode.title: BOSKOV'S DAY OUT
episode.description: Ghastly takes Boskov for a walk in the park. Can she keep Boskov safe from his old circus trainer?

episode.title: GO SPORK!
episode.description: Cod Commando and the forces of SPORK must foil Hector's latest plot to take over the world!

episode.title: MEET ROBIN
episode.description: Actress Tinashe Kachingwe gives you the scoop on playing Robin on the new show "Out of Jimmy's Head." Watch the premiere episode of Out of Jimmy's Head Friday, September 14 at 7 p.m. (e/p)

episode.title: MEET DAD
episode.description: Comedian Bil Dwyer shares his thoughts on playing Jimmy's child-like father and guidance counselor. Watch the premiere episode of Out of Jimmy's Head Friday, September 14 at 7 p.m. (e/p)

episode.title: MEET SONNY
episode.description: Matt Knudsen talks about playing the struggling evil genius Sonny Appleday on the new show "Out of Jimmy's Head."

episode.title: MEET JIMMY
episode.description: Check out a behind the scenes interview with "Out of Jimmy's Head" star Dominic Janes. Watch the premiere episode of Out of Jimmy's Head Friday, September 14 at 7 p.m. (e/p)

episode.title: MEET CRAIG
episode.description: Actor Jon Kent Ethridge talks about playing Craig on "Out of Jimmy's Head." Watch the premiere episode of Out of Jimmy's Head Friday, September 14 at 7 p.m. (e/p)

episode.title: LUNCH TABLE!
episode.description: Jimmy eats a decades-old meatball to win an open spot at the cool kids' table while Craig finds true love with Becky. Meanwhile, Dolly tries to be more accepting of the B-list cartoons.

episode.title: JOHNNY'S TELETHON
episode.description: Johnny stages a telethon to keep his favorite beef jerky store in business.

episode.title: DOOMMATES
episode.description: Johnny moves out and rents a trailer with Carl.

episode.title: OVER THE HUMP
episode.description: After Johnny accidentally joins the French Foreign Legion, he must find his way through the Sahara Desert with the help of a reluctant camel named Lawrence.

episode.title: I USED TO BE FUNNY
episode.description: Johnny gets embroiled in a battle between two clowns fighting over who's funnier. And Johnny hates clowns!

episode.title: DID YOU SEE A BULL RUN BY HERE?
episode.description: Johnny is in Pamplona for the running of the bulls. He finds himself in a bullfight against an honorable bovine with a heart of gold.

episode.title: DATE WITH AN ANTELOPE
episode.description: Johnny learns a lesson about cyber-dating when the girl he woos over the Internet turns out to be an antelope!

episode.title: A LEAGUE OF HIS OWN
episode.description: Johnny poses as a girl who is "large for her age" to help out Suzy's softball team.

episode.title: JOHNNY GOES TO CAMP
episode.description: Johnny gets on the wrong bus and ends up at computer camp with Carl as his counselor.

episode.title: BUFFOON LAGOON
episode.description: Johnny is shipwrecked with a pretty girl who won't take yes for an answer.

episode.title: JOHNNY REAL GOOD
episode.description: Johnny's got to babysit an all-powerful toddler!

episode.title: BERRY THE BUTLER
episode.description: Mama wins Berry Vanderbolten, a famous pop singer, to be her butler for a day. The only problem is that Johnny has real chores in mind for the famous songster.

episode.title: BRAVO, JAMES BRAVO
episode.description: Johnny finds himself caught up in the world of international espionage!

episode.title: JUMBO JOHNNY
episode.description: Johnny drinks too much Uber Mass and grows to monstrous proportions.

episode.title: INTENSIVE CARE
episode.description: When Johnny spies a pretty nurse at the hospital, he runs afoul of Alphonse the Twisted Orderly.

episode.title: SUBSTITUTE TEACHER
episode.description: A crook on the run convinces Johnny that he's the substitute martial arts teacher. The crook then gives Johnny important tests that include robbing a bank and evading the police.

episode.title: BLANKY HANKY PANKY
episode.description: A nut who thinks he's a cat has stolen all the yarn in Aron City except for one piece: Johnny Bravo's precious baby blanket.

episode.title: TALK TO ME BABY
episode.description: Johnny sees talk show host, Vendela, on television and decides that he's the guy for her. Unfortunately for Johnny, Vendela and her guests have a little something to say about that.

episode.title: HIP-HOP FLOP!
episode.description: A flygirl catches Johnny's eye, but the only way she'll look back is if Johnny gets all funky fresh. When the group "The Round Pound" comes to Aron City, Johnny gets a crash course in hip-hop culture.

episode.title: THE MAN WHO CRIED CLOWN
episode.description: Johnny awakens to find himself on a flight through the Zone Where Normal Things Don't Happen Very Much... and there's a clown on the wing of the plane.

episode.title: NOIR JOHNNY
episode.description: Johnny becomes a detective and takes on the case of Suzy's missing dolly, meeting up with a cast of characters straight out of the film noir handbook.

episode.title: DAMIEN'S DAY OUT
episode.description: When a baby is left on Johnny's doorstep, Johnny decides to raise him as his own. Everything's going well until the adorable tyke turns out to be pure evil.

episode.title: CARL BE NOT PROUD
episode.description: When he mistakenly thinks Carl has only 24 hours to live, Johnny tries to be the best friend Carl always fantasized he was.

episode.title: WITLESS
episode.description: After getting on the wrong bus, Johnny ends up in farm country, where he fails to fit in with the simple folk who live there.

episode.title: BRAVE NEW JOHNNY
episode.description: Johnny becomes frozen in hair gel and wakes up in the 25th century.

episode.title: ST. VALENTINE'S DAY
episode.description: Aelita receives a Valentine's Day gift from a mysterious admirer, who she assumes is Jeremy. But it turns out the gift is actually from X.A.N.A., and has the capability to destroy her!

episode.title: MISTER PUCK
episode.description: The group returns to the Hermitage to investigate Aelita's frightening visions, and Aelita finds a strangely familiar toy. A key found on the toy leads the team to some heavily protected secrets.

episode.title: A GREAT DAY
episode.description: X.A.N.A. gains control of the supercomputer's return trip program, and our heroes soon find that the trips are increasing their enemy's power.

episode.title: EXPLORATION
episode.description: After discovering Sector 5, the group decides to explore it, and soon finds it is actually a part of X.A.N.A. itself. Meanwhile, Yumi's parents begin to worry about her late-night excursions.

episode.title: UNCHARTED TERRITORY
episode.description: When the other students give her a hard time, Aelita decides to run back to Lyoko. The gang soon discovers that X.A.N.A. has kidnapped her and taken her to an unknown sector!

episode.title: NEW ORDER
episode.description: Aelita moves to the Academy to live with her pals. However, life on Earth is no bed of roses for her. X.A.N.A. has taken over a house in the neighborhood, and lures the gang there to destroy them!

episode.title: CODE: EARTH
episode.description: Jeremy has finally finished the devirtualization program which will bring Aelita to life. But when he goes to retrieve the CD from his room, Jeremy comes face-to-face with a suspicious Jim.

episode.title: GHOST CHANNEL
episode.description: As usual, our heroes are sent back in time after a successful mission. But when Jeremy arrives in Mrs. Hertz's class twelve hours earlier, he realizes that Odd, Yumi and Ulrich are missing!

episode.title: ROCK BOTTOM
episode.description: Odd has a crush on Sam, a rebellious teen from a nearby school. But when Sam tries to steal a laptop, Odd is blamed. Meanwhile, X.A.N.A. attacks the buildings' foundations, causing them to crumble.

episode.title: ROUTINE
episode.description: Tired of the same routine, and of Yumi's seeming indifference towards him, Ulrich starts seeing another girl. Meanwhile, X.A.N.A.'s latest scheme is anything but ordinary.

episode.title: ZERO-GRAVITY ZONE
episode.description: All Ulrich can think about is impressing his parents at his soccer final. That is, until X.A.N.A. creates an ever-increasing anti-gravity zone, and people and objects start floating away.

episode.title: THE ROBOTS
episode.description: While Herve and Jeremy's droids fight one another for the school's Robot Encounters Day, X.A.N.A. releases a much more frightening robot on the school, creating panic and mayhem.

episode.title: FRONTIER
episode.description: When Jeremy enters Lyoko, Yumi accidentally traps him between the real world and the virtual universe. And with part of the scanner's memory lost, no one else can get into Lyoko to look for him.

episode.title: KILLER MUSIC
episode.description: When a killer song is played, people everywhere, including Odd, begin lapsing into comas. Ulrich, Yumi and Jeremy will have to act fast if they want to save Odd, and the world, from certain doom.

episode.title: AMNESIA
episode.description: X.A.N.A. uses a nano virus to give Ulrich amnesia. Sissi takes full advantage of the situation, convincing him that she is his girlfriend and that Odd, Yumi and Jeremy are his sworn enemies.

episode.title: CLAUSTROPHOBIA
episode.description: X.A.N.A. "infests" the metal-siding of the school's walls and transforms it into an electrified prison cell. No one can get in or out. Only Yumi has the power to save her friends on Lyoko.

episode.title: LAUGHING FIT
episode.description: Yumi is distressed by the news that her parents are getting a trial separation. Meanwhile, X.A.N.A. attacks with a bottle of laughing gas, causing our heroes to break into fits of laughter.

episode.title: THE TRAP
episode.description: X.A.N.A. takes over every last mechanism in the factory, planning a trap for our heroes. Yumi, Ulrich and Sissi step into the elevator and right into the trap as the elevator plummets to the ground.

episode.title: THE GIRLS OF MY DREAMS
episode.description: The new girl in school is the spitting image of Aelita. Meanwhile, Aelita goes missing on Lyoko. Jeremy is certain that this is no simple coincidence.

episode.title: SATELLITE
episode.description: X.A.N.A. uses a communications antenna to turn a very powerful military satellite into an instrument of mass destruction! Only a victory on Lyoko can save the day.

episode.title: END OF TAKE
episode.description: A movie director is filming his next movie in our heroes' factory. Ulrich gets a job on the film so he can protect the lab. But what will happen when X.A.N.A. takes control of the film's leading man?

episode.title: IMAGE PROBLEM
episode.description: After she mysteriously disappears and then reappears on Lyoko, Yumi is replaced by an evil and almost indestructible clone with one mission - to destroy our heroes!

episode.title: CRUEL DILEMMA
episode.description: Yumi falls into the digital sea and gets stuck as a virtual character. Jeremy has discovered how to make Aelita into a real person. But he can only bring one person to life. Will it be Yumi or Aelita?

episode.title: BIG BUG
episode.description: X.A.N.A. unleashes a computer virus and the railway control center is hit hard. With two trains on a collision course, our heroes must counter X.A.N.A.'s evil plan and stop the deadly collision.

episode.title: STARK RAVING MAD
episode.description: The spies' old nemesis, Mr. Sebastian, is holding extreme underground raves in Beverly Hills. And his music is inciting the ravers to destroy whatever venue they're in.

episode.title: FIRST BRAT
episode.description: The girls are assigned babysitting duty for the President's 11-year-old daughter, Madison. At first Madison seems to be a perfect angel, but soon turns into a major brat.

episode.title: MOMMIES DEAREST
episode.description: It's Mother's Day, and the spies decide to take their moms to an exclusive spa to celebrate. But it turns out that their moms are being controlled by their old foe, Tim Scam.

episode.title: I, DUDE
episode.description: When tsunamis wipe out tourist areas all over the world, WOOHP sends in the spies. They discover that the storms are an evil plot by an ex-surfer to restore the beaches to their original surfability.

episode.title: BOY BANDS WILL BE BOY BANDS
episode.description: The Spies investigate the hottest new pop band, Teensicle, when several band members begin to mysteriously disappear.

episode.title: GREEN WITH N.V.
episode.description: Rejected as a teen, Natalie Valentine's seeking revenge by making every man in the universe worship her. Can the spies stop her before she crop-dusts the world with her "possessive" scent?

episode.title: HERE COMES THE SUN
episode.description: The spies investigate a former beach bunny beauty queen who devises a device that selectively intensifies the sun's rays on certain parts of the world, subjecting those people to severe heat and sun.

episode.title: IT'S HOW YOU PLAY THE GAME
episode.description: When the team from Zanzibar begins sweeping the winter Olympics, the girls are sent to investigate. They find that an evil coach is creating super-athletes by injecting them with dangerous hormones!

episode.title: EVIL HAIR SALON
episode.description: The girls follow an evil hair salon owner that is using a "special formula" to grow her clients' hair to massive proportions. The only problem is, the formula is sucking the life out of the customers.

episode.title: MUMMY
episode.description: The spies travel to Egypt to investigate strange occurrences at a pyramid. They unravel an evil archaeologist's plot to resurrect an ancient Egyptian curse that would give him eternal power.

episode.title: MALLED
episode.description: A sinister store in malls across the world is abducting shoppers and turning them into anti-consumer terrorists.

episode.title: GAME GIRLS
episode.description: A villain invents a device which captures extreme sports stars and places them into an extreme video game. Meanwhile, Alex falls for a teen idol who turns out to be a computer-generated personality.

episode.title: ALIENS
episode.description: The spies investigate alien abductions and a secret organization called GOOPER. Meanwhile, Alex prepares for her driving test.

episode.title: SPY GLADIATORS
episode.description: The spies enter a "Survivor"-type game show to investigate missing contestants. They quickly find out that the show's "simulated" combat is anything but pretend.

episode.title: SILICON VALLEY GIRLS
episode.description: A computer geek turns his mega-computer against those who have wronged him. It's up to the spies to stop the computer before it carries out plans for mass destruction.

episode.title: CHILD'S PLAY
episode.description: An evil toy maker dispatches his mind-controlling toys to adults of the world to turn them into children. Meanwhile, Clover tries to act more grown-up in order to get Rick, a senior, to like her.

episode.title: ABDUCTIONS
episode.description: A diabolical father has found a way to transplant the intelligence of geniuses into his son's brain. Can the spies stop the villain before their own intelligence is reduced to that of a rodent?

episode.title: THE FUGITIVES
episode.description: When the girls show up at WOOHP for their next mission, they're shocked to see footage of themselves robbing a bank! Knowing that they are innocent, they have no choice but to go on the run.

episode.title: ORPHAN SUBSTITUTE
episode.description: While on a mission to cure George W. Bush's unpresidential obsession with building the world's biggest ball of twine, Otto runs into Sister Thornly and winds up back in the orphanage.

episode.title: HORSE OF HORRORS
episode.description: Paul Revere is having trouble making his midnight ride due to a fear of horses. After Time Squad fails to solve his problem by putting him on other animals, they enlist the help of Dr. Sigmund Freud.

episode.title: DAY OF THE LARRYS
episode.description: Burdened with chores, Larry builds a replica of himself so he can rest and relax. Soon, the double makes a double and quickly the satellite is crawling with Larrys!

episode.title: CHILD'S PLAY
episode.description: Shakespeare is trying to cash in on the youth market by writing a play aimed at kids. When Time Squad shows up, Shakespeare is inspired to write a play about a man of metal, a genius kid and a yahoo cop.

episode.title: A SANDWICH BY ANY OTHER NAME
episode.description: The famed inventor of the world's favorite lunch food has named his creation something truly gross and no one wants to eat it.

episode.title: FEUD FOR THOUGHT
episode.description: The most famous feud in American history isn't going as planned. The McCoys aren't fighting the Hatfields. Larry, armed with a book on motivational training, teaches the McCoys to have some backbone.

episode.title: NUTORIOUS
episode.description: George Washington Carver is in hot water. His evil brother Todd is out to quash his success by inventing a hundred evil uses for the peanut.

episode.title: LUDWIG VAN BONE CRUSHER
episode.description: Beethoven has found wrestling more enjoyable than playing music. Tuddrussel vows to beat him in the ring, but fails. However, with Otto's help, the composer realizes his true destiny lies with music.

episode.title: KILLING TIME
episode.description: Time Squad completes their mission of returning Copernicus to astronomy, and must kill a few minutes before zapping back to the satellite.

episode.title: RECRUITMENT AD
episode.description: Do YOU have what it takes to join Time Squad?

episode.title: THE BRAWLERS LAST STAND
episode.description: After Shun receives a challenge from Masquerade, the Brawlers hatch a plan to use the battle to rescue Dan and Drago from the Doom Dimension!

episode.title: SHOWDOWN
episode.description: Dan finally faces off with Masquerade in a deadly battle! Will our hero and his Bakugan come out on top? It's victory or the Doom Dimension in the brawl everyone's been waiting for!

episode.title: DOOM DIMENSION OR BUST!
episode.description: Masquerade turns on his own gang and battles them, sending all of their Bakugan to the Doom Dimension! He then vows to defeat all of the Battle Brawlers and send their Bakugan to the same fate!

episode.title: TRUST ME
episode.description: Runo suspects Alice is secretly spying on the Brawlers and giving information to Masquerade. Can she prove her loyalty, or is she really working for the enemy?

episode.title: THE SECRET OF SUCCESS!
episode.description: Alice befriends a young Bakugan player named Christopher who loves his Bakugan yet always loses in battle. She convinces him that battling is more than just skill and power; it's about confidence.

episode.title: SAY IT AIN'T SO, JOE!
episode.description: The Brawlers have reason to suspect that Joe the webmaster is spying on them. When Dan confronts him about his relationship with Masquerade, Joe says he'll talk if Dan battles him!

episode.title: MY GOOD FRIEND
episode.description: The Brawlers are ambushed by three of Masquerade's gang. A triple battle ensues and, to the shock of Marucho, his Bakugan Preyas is under the control of the bad guys!

episode.title: A LITTLE HELP FROM MY FRIENDS!
episode.description: Dan and Shun have a falling out, and Shun takes off on his own to seek out and destroy Masquerade. He goes head-to-head with Komba, one of Masquerade's recruits, in a wicked battle.

episode.title: JULIE PLAYS HARD BRAWL
episode.description: Julie finds herself in a brawl with her childhood friend Billy in order to save him from Masquerade.

episode.title: EVOLUTION REVOLUTION
episode.description: Runo and Marucho discover a control room in Klause Von Herzon's castle with a display of Bakugan player rankings from around the world and are challenged by a Bakugan player named Julio.

episode.title: B.F.F.  BEST FRIENDS FOREVER
episode.description: While searching for information on the Infinity Core, the Brawlers discover a lead which takes them to Germany. There they meet the world's second-best Bakugan player, Klause Von Herzon.

episode.title: NO GUTS  NO GLORY
episode.description: While the Bakugan Battle Brawlers continue their search for the Infinity Core, Shun becomes convinced that someone is spying on them. An investigation lures out Chan Lee, one of Masquerade's gang.

episode.title: THE STORY OF VESTROIA
episode.description: Lured by an invitation to celebrate their world-class rankings, five of the top ten Bakugan players gather at a mysterious mansion. There they meet Masquerade and the evil Bakugan, Naga.

episode.title: DUEL IN THE DESERT
episode.description: The Brawlers head off to Bakugan Valley looking for the Infinity Core. During the search, they run into Julie's childhood friends Billy and Komba who challenge them to a high stakes battle.

episode.title: JUST FOR THE SHUN OF IT
episode.description: Dan joins Runo and Marucho in another attempt to recruit Shun. When they arrive at Shun's home, Masquerade is already there! Get ready for a shocking battle between friends!

episode.title: BAKUGAN STALL
episode.description: Alice realizes that she may have a connection to the mysterious Hal-G, but can't get up the courage to tell the rest of the Brawlers. Meanwhile, Dan recalls the last battle that he had with Shun.

episode.title: GRANDPA'S GOT A BRAND NEW BAKUGAN
episode.description: Marucho and Runo realize that the combined strength of the Battle Brawlers doesn't match up to Masquerade's power. Without Dan's knowledge, they visit Shun to try and convince him to join the team.

episode.title: BAKUGAN IDOL
episode.description: Marucho reveals that he has secretly moved into Dan's neighborhood and throws a welcoming bash. Elsewhere, famous pop duo Jenny and Jewls are approached by Masquerade.

episode.title: A COMBINATION BATTLE
episode.description: While at an amusement park, Dan and Runo are invited on stage to assist two brothers performing a magic act. It just so happens that the brothers are working with the mysterious Masquerade!

episode.title: RUNO RULES
episode.description: Dan and Runo meet in person for the first time! When she finds out that Dan has been challenged to a duel with Masquerade, Runo goes to fight in his place.

episode.title: DAN AND DRAGO
episode.description: Dan is having a hard time without Drago around. Feeling frustrated, he takes his anger out on a school friend name Ryo. Taking advantage of the situation, Masquerade convinces Ryo to battle Dan.

episode.title: A FEUD BETWEEN FRIENDS
episode.description: Masquerade teams with a young player named Rikimaru by offering him a very special Bakugan. Across town, Dan begins training, but does Drago trust him enough to remain allies?

episode.title: MASQUERADE BALL
episode.description: A mysterious player named Masquerade has been stealing Bakugans from kids all around the world. When Dan hears about this, he decides to put an end to it and challenges Masquerade to a battle.

episode.title: FOOD
episode.description: It's time to eat, so bring on the food!

episode.title: NIGHT
episode.description: We stay up even later to have some nighttime fun!

episode.title: FULL MOON
episode.description: We stay up late and enjoy the full moon.

episode.title: MUSIC
episode.description: It's time for fun with music!

episode.title: RESTAURANTS
episode.description: We put on our dinner clothes and go out to eat at restaurants.

episode.title: CHORES
episode.description: It's time to get down to business with some chores.

episode.title: GARDENS
episode.description: We take a relaxing walk through some gardens!

episode.title: JOBS
episode.description: It's time to get a job.

episode.title: CANNED GOODS
episode.description: Things get "corny" as we have fun with cans!

episode.title: CONSTRUCTION
episode.description: We roll up our sleeves and try our hands at construction.

episode.title: ADVENTURE
episode.description: It's time to seize the day and have an adventure!

episode.title: FISH
episode.description: We hold our breath and dive into the world of fish!

episode.title: PAINT
episode.description: It's time to get artsy and play with paint.

episode.title: TRAINS
episode.description: It's time to hop on the rails and take a ride with trains.

episode.title: AMUSEMENT PARK
episode.description: We take a trip to the amusement park!

episode.title: CAMPING
episode.description: We put on our hiking boots and go camping in the woods.

episode.title: FAIR
episode.description: It's a day at the fair!

episode.title: INVENTIONS
episode.description: We make amazing discoveries with new inventions.

episode.title: MALL
episode.description: It's time for a trip to the mall!

episode.title: BOATS
episode.description: We set sail and spend some time at sea.

episode.title: BEACH
episode.description: Break out the suntan lotion for a fun day at the beach!

episode.title: BOOKS
episode.description: It's time to do a little light reading.

episode.title: LAKE
episode.description: We're off for a fun-filled day at the Lake!

episode.title: SCIENCE
episode.description: It's time to tackle important scientific discoveries.

episode.title: OPERATION: T.R.A.I.N.I.N.G
episode.description: Numbuh Two's younger brother, Tommy, and his fellow cadets discover that their training simulations in the Kids Next Door Arctic Training Base may not be simulations after all.

episode.title: OPERATION: B.U.T.T.
episode.description: When Numbuhs Two through Five force Numbuh One to take a day off at the beach, they unwittingly set him up to be exposed in the most embarrassing way possible.

episode.title: OPERATION: M.A.T.A.D.O.R.
episode.description: When the KND prepare to attack the sinister Soccer Mom, Numbuh Four must choose between the mission and his new secret gig as a matador at the Bully Fights.

episode.title: OPERATION: C.H.O.C.O.L.A.T.E.
episode.description: While hunting for MARSmallows on the red planet, Numbuh Five's family and friends are attacked by a bitter enemy who has become only a hollow shell of the boy he was before!

episode.title: OPERATION: S.I.T.T.E.R.
episode.description: When Hoagie discovers that the beautiful yet dangerous Cree is his babysitter, will it be a dream come true or turn into a nightmare?

episode.title: OPERATION: C.L.U.E.S.
episode.description: When a "friendly" Sunday dinner with Numbuh Two's and Numbuh Three's families takes a dramatic turn, only Hoagie's detective skills can solve the case!

episode.title: OPERATION: F.O.O.D.F.I.T.E.
episode.description: Gramma Stuffum unleashes a gastronomic grossness on the school in a rock opera that's hard to swallow!

episode.title: OPERATION: R.A.B.B.I.T.
episode.description: Numbuhs Two and Five venture into the deep, dark vastness of the Jungle Gym to find the Second Grade's missing bunny--only to discover that an old nemesis with a horrible, yet sugary, secret awaits them.

episode.title: OPERATION: H.O.U.N.D.
episode.description: When Numbuh Five tells her teacher that a vicious dog ate her homework, she's not lying. But the truth about the beast is even more frightening!

episode.title: OPERATION: S.P.R.O.U.T.
episode.description: Numbuh Four accidentally eats a Brussels sprout, sending the rest of the KND on an emergency fantastic voyage to stop the dreaded vegetable from being ingested.

episode.title: OPERATION: T.R.I.P.
episode.description: Numbuh Three journeys to her homeland, and is tracked the Interesting Twins from Beneath the Mountain. But Numbuh Three has a few surprises up those long sleeves of hers...

episode.title: OPERATION: D.O.G.-F.I.G.H.T.
episode.description: Numbuh Two's pride is damaged, and his aircraft is destroyed, when a mysterious pilot takes to the skies. But is this hot-dogging newcomer really the greatest threat to the suburban skies?

episode.title: OPERATION: U.N.C.O.O.L.
episode.description: Numbuh Two convinces the KND to journey to a spooky Cyprus Treehouse in the Bayou and rescue the all-important Numbuh 73. But when the others discover the truth about Numbuh 73, is it too late?

episode.title: OPERATION: T.R.I.C.K.Y.
episode.description: The big question this Halloween is who'll get the most candy this year? Unfortunately, Numbuh Four's candy quest is complicated by the crafty Stickybeard and his horde of Candy Pirates!

episode.title: OPERATION: L.O.C.K.D.O.W.N.
episode.description: An emergency Treehouse lockdown has saved the fleeing Numbuh One and his team from their spankiest enemy--or has it?

episode.title: OPERATION: C.A.K.E.D.-T.H.R.E.E.
episode.description: Once again, the Delightful Children from Down the Lane are determined not to share their extra-yummy birthday cake. But the KND won't give up, even when their plans accidentally hatch.

episode.title: OPERATION: R.A.I.N.B.O.W.S.
episode.description: When Numbuh Three discovers that her beloved Rainbow Monkey dolls are based on real animals, she travels to exotic Rainbow Monkey Island with the mysterious Mr. Mogul.

episode.title: OPERATION: R.O.B.B.E.R.S.
episode.description: Homework bandits stage a daring hold-up on the 8:30 school bus. But they don't know that this bus carries Numbuh Four, who's done his homework and doesn't like the idea of bandits messin' with it.

episode.title: OPERATION: U.T.O.P.I.A.
episode.description: Numbuh One discovers a perfect island where there are no parents or bedtimes, and you can even have cake for dinner!

episode.title: OPERATION: S.P.A.N.K.
episode.description: When a stint in the slammer helps the dreaded Count Spankulot see the wrong of his hiney-hurting ways, the reformed 'Sultan of Sting' becomes determined to join the KND.

episode.title: OPERATION: L.E.A.D.E.R.
episode.description: Poor "Nigie" is exhausted from all of his missions, at least according to his girlfriend Lizzie, who decides to do Numbuh One a favor and take over his position as mission leader.

episode.title: OPERATION: E.N.D.
episode.description: Numbuh One is wrongly accused of being 13 years old, and ambushed by a decommissioning squad. With no access to his team or his Treehouse, he must rely on himself to unravel this global conspiracy!

episode.title: TIME MACHINE
episode.description: Cow and Chicken find a time machine that takes them back to the beginning of history, where they accidentally drop a quarter into the primordial soup. What will this do to the history of mankind?

episode.title: ORTHODONTIC POLICE
episode.description: Cow and Chicken discover that a vigilante orthodontist has been putting braces on people all over town and decide to end his reign of dental terror.

episode.title: HAPPY MEAT
episode.description: Cow and Chicken rebel against the school cafeteria and set up their own rival food concession, featuring some of Mom's favorite recipes: pork butts and taters, mayonnaise pie and chicken fried veins.

episode.title: LAWNMOWER CHICKEN
episode.description: Chicken's found a good way to earn cash: mowing old man Devlin's yard. But the back yard turns out to be the Swiss Alps, overgrown with tall grass. And he won't get paid unless he finishes by sundown.

episode.title: ALIVE!
episode.description: Cow and her babysitter, cousin Boneless Chicken, accidentally get stuck up on the roof. Cow's afraid they're going to be stranded up there forever.

episode.title: PART TIME JOB
episode.description: To earn money for toys, Chicken gets an afterschool job at a chicken farm -- which turns out to be a supplier of fried chicken to a fast food chain. Supercow must come to Chicken's rescue.

episode.title: ME AN' MY DOG
episode.description: Cow brings home an invisible (and imaginary) dog. Chicken thinks she's a fool. But Cow's imaginary dog goes on to win first place in the dog show as well as have imaginary puppies.

episode.title: SOW AND CHICKEN
episode.description: Cow and Chicken's cousin, Sow, an animal from the wrong side of the tracks, shows up to stay at Cow and Chicken's house.

episode.title: SERGEANT WEENIE ARMS
episode.description: Chicken, Flem and Earl embark upon the true test of manhood as they invoke the spirit of Sergeant Weenie Arms, the world's best action figure.

episode.title: THE GREAT PANTZINI
episode.description: Mom and Dad force Cow and Chicken to join the circus. Through various idiotic means, Red trains Cow and Chicken to be a part of his circus.

episode.title: DUCK, DUCK, CHICKEN
episode.description: Through the miracle of surgery, Red turns Chicken into a duck. Mom and Dad take Red to court, but their case is thrown out. Mom and Dad take their new duck home only to learn that it's duck season!

episode.title: I.M. WEASEL: THE SACKLESS GAMES
episode.description: Lance Sackless (Red) runs a scam that pits Weasel and Baboon against each other in Olympic-styled games.

episode.title: PIANO LESSONS
episode.description: Red Guy tries to teach Cow and Chicken how to play the piano. But it's no use. Cow will only milks the keys and Chicken just pecks at them with his beak.

episode.title: COW'S A BEAUTY
episode.description: Red Guy teaches Cow how to win a beauty contest.

episode.title: WHO IS SUPERCOW?
episode.description: Trying to uncover the secret identity of Supercow, Red Guy opens a dry-cleaning shop for superhero outfits. But he becomes confused when Chicken comes to pick up the suit.

episode.title: THE BALLAD OF COW AND CHICKEN
episode.description: Teacher, backed up by Flem and Earl, sings a ballad of Cow and Chicken, two youngsters chased across the land by the government agent man: Red.

episode.title: COW AND CHICKEN BLUES
episode.description: When Cow and Chicken get the blues, Dad sends them to a neighbor's house, where they meet a famous blues singer. He sings them a tale of a heroic Red Guy, who lost his pants to a fierce alligator.

episode.title: RED BUTLER
episode.description: Red Guy signs on as the butler at Cow and Chicken's house. He does everything for them, from cutting the meat and cheese on their plates to answering their questions in school.

episode.title: PENALTY WHEEL
episode.description: Cow, Chicken, Flem and Earl are contestants on Red's game show. If they can't complete his tasks, he makes them spin the Penalty Wheel. True to form, Red's penalties are ludicrous.

episode.title: THE BIG MOVE
episode.description: Mom and Dad tell Cow and Chicken that they're all moving to a new house. Cow and Chicken get nostalgic as they pack their belongings.

episode.title: SEND IN THE CLOWNS
episode.description: When a family of clowns moves in next door to Cow and Chicken, Cow immediately falls in love with the clown boy.

episode.title: CLOUD NINE
episode.description: Chicken desperately wants to ride on the machine outside the grocery store. He promises to be Cow's slave if she'll give him a quarter. But when Red moves the ride, Chicken chases it all over town.

episode.title: MALL COP
episode.description: Accused of shoplifting, Cow and Chicken are chased all over the mall by Red, the mall cop.

episode.title: THE FULL MOUNTY
episode.description: When Dad takes Cow and Chicken to work with him, Red, the office Mounty, rides his horse through the office building, tracking them down as if he were patrolling the wilds of the Yukon.

episode.title: NOW YOU COLISEUM, NOW YOU DON'T
episode.description: It's Chooks vs. Ninja Chimps in a gladiator-style showdown!

episode.title: KOBURA STRIKES
episode.description: An enemy from Chuckie's past returns to seek revenge.

episode.title: BIG BAD BUBBA
episode.description: Bubba is possessed by an ancient demon.

episode.title: GAME OVER CHOOKS
episode.description: The Chooks find themselves in a deadly virtual battle.

episode.title: DOUBLE TROUBLE
episode.description: Robot look-alikes of the Chooks go on a crime spree.

episode.title: RAINY SEASON
episode.description: To get out of doing his chores, George calls on Chuck, the rain spirit. But he soon learns that there is no such thing as free rain.

episode.title: WITCHING STICK
episode.description: George accidentally snaps the Witch Doctor's "witching stick" - oops! But when Magnolia takes the blame, George's guilt begins to get the better of him.

episode.title: GEORGE LAYS AN EGG
episode.description: George takes on daddy duties when he discovers an egg in his hammock. Will his friends be able to convince George that people don't lay eggs?

episode.title: BATHROOM OF THE APES
episode.description: After Ape complains that he needs more alone time, George makes a new friend, the sinister Jungle Joel. But things come to a …um, head, when Joel steals an outhouse that's guarded by an ancient curse.

episode.title: CHOWDER'S GIRLFRIEND
episode.description: When Panini sets her love-struck eyes on Chowder, he tries every trick he can think of to convince her that he's not her boyfriend.

episode.title: BANNED FROM THE STAND
episode.description: After an argument with Mung leaves him drunk with power, Gazpacho must choose between being right or winning back his friends.

episode.title: THE VACATION
episode.description: Chowder, Mung and Shnitzel just want to spend a nice day at the beach, but when they all get trapped in the bathroom it becomes a race to escape before Chowder explodes from having to go number one.

episode.title: THE HEAVY SLEEPER
episode.description: When Chowder accidentally puts Mung into a deep sleep, he and Shnitzel must race across town to find a cure before Truffles finds out what they've done.

episode.title: THUROP VAN ORMAN INTERVIEW: PART 5
episode.description: The creator and voice of Flapjack answers a very serious question.

episode.title: THUROP VAN ORMAN INTERVIEW: PART 4
episode.description: Thurop Van Orman, creator of "The Marvelous Misadventures of Flapjack," talks about the most precious thing in the world... candy!

episode.title: THUROP VAN ORMAN INTERVIEW: PART 3
episode.description: What's so funny about "The Marvelous Misadventures of Flapjack"? Find out from the show's creator, Thurop Van Orman.

episode.title: THUROP VAN ORMAN INTERVIEW: PART 2
episode.description: Flapjack creator Thurop Van Orman talks about the unique look of the show.

episode.title: THUROP VAN ORMAN INTERVIEW: PART 1
episode.description: Meet Thurop Van Orman, master mis-adventurer and creator of Flapjack!

episode.title: THAT'S A WRAP
episode.description: Peppermint Larry enlists Flapjack and K'nuckles to help him find old candy wrappers. Premieres June 5 at 8:30p (e/p) on Cartoon Network.

episode.title: K'NUCKLES IS A FILTHY RAT
episode.description: While K'nuckles is away on business, Flapjack befriends an unhealthy rat, which makes everyone in Stormalong uncomfortable.

episode.title: COMIC CON INTERVIEW: THE VOICES OF BEN 10: ALIEN FORCE
episode.description: The voices behind Ben 10: Alien Force talk about what it's like to give life to your favorite characters!

episode.title: WHAT ARE LITTLE GIRLS MADE OF?
episode.description: Ben and Gwen learn that their grandmother, Verdona, is actually an alien! After learning the truth, Gwen must make a difficult choice.

episode.title: THE MOTHER OF ALL MARATHONS
episode.description: Mike might be good at little things, like balancing coconuts and sprinting, but Lu brags she'll beat her at a race of endurance.

episode.title: WHOLE LOTTA SHAKIN'
episode.description: Mt. Henry is rumbling and that spells party for the islanders. Mike alone thinks roasting coconuts and getting facials from a volcano is odd. When lava does start to flow, everyone is trapped.

episode.title: A BOY'S GAME
episode.description: Mike longs for her PocketPlayer video gaming system. Og creates the "OgPlayer 1," which beats Mike repeatedly and mercilessly. When she gives up, Og gives it a go.

episode.title: YO HO WHO?
episode.description: Mike, Lu, and Og decide to investigate the Barnacle. They've heard rumors of stranded pirates, and maybe even treasure. But when they do meet up with the Captain, it's all they can do to get away.

episode.title: PALM PET
episode.description: Mike resolves to find herself a friend, but on an island of seven that's easier said than done. Out of desperation, she befriends a tiny palm tree, which Margery and Alfred mistake for her new pet.

episode.title: ELEPHANT WALK
episode.description: Lu is sick of riding Lancelot's hard shell; an elephant is more to her fancy! But none of the adults will let her ride one. Mike agrees to help her, on one condition: the elephants have to be clean.

episode.title: LOSING LANCELOT
episode.description: In a drastic attempt to escape Lu's tormenting, Lancelot takes a plunge into the ocean. Lu thinks he's drowned; Lance is a land turtle, plus the waters are infested with sharks.

episode.title: TEA FOR THREE
episode.description: The island's prized cup has been stolen, and Lu naturally accuses Mike. Intent on finding the real culprit, Mike does some sneaky detective work on the other islanders.

episode.title: SULTANS OF SWAT
episode.description: Mike wants to play baseball, and gets the whole island into the game. It's a rocky start but the islanders catch on quickly. Lu's natural talent sparks a bitter rivalry between Mike and her.

episode.title: ROLLER MADNESS
episode.description: Mike is not impressed by the game "Coconuts" and has Og create some rollerblades. Soon everyone is bladin' around the island like pros.

episode.title: THE TUBE
episode.description: Frustrated by Lu's inability to appreciate Action Guy's true genius, Mike constructs a mock television and stages a show starring the famous hero.

episode.title: THE ART OF LEAVING THEM LAUGHING
episode.description: Skunk decides to become a comedian, and his comic talent comes in handy on a mission against the Ninja Monkeys. But when all of the monkeys group together, will his jokes be enough to save the day?

episode.title: DOCK OF SHAME - HAROLD
episode.description: Welcome to the Dock of Shame! Say farewell to this week's loser with a look back at the camper's best moments at Camp Wawanakwa, and tune in Thursdays at 9 p.m. (e/p) to catch more of the drama.

episode.title: DOCK OF SHAME - COURTNEY
episode.description: Welcome to the Dock of Shame! Say farewell to this week's loser with a look back at the camper's best moments at Camp Wawanakwa, and tune in Thursdays at 9 p.m. (e/p) to catch more of the drama.

episode.title: DOCK OF SHAME - SADIE
episode.description: Welcome to the Dock of Shame! Say farewell to this week's loser with a look back at the camper's best moments at Camp Wawanakwa, and tune in Thursdays at 9 p.m. (e/p) to catch more of the drama.

episode.title: DOCK OF SHAME - BETH
episode.description: Welcome to the Dock of Shame! Say farewell to this week's loser with a look back at the camper's best moments at Camp Wawanakwa, and tune in Thursdays at 9 p.m. (e/p) to catch more of the drama.

episode.title: BRUNCH OF DISGUSTINGNESS
episode.description: The campers have reached the halfway point. Their reward is: no vote-off this week! Their challenge is: eat a nine course meal of disgusting stuff in the vilest banquet Chef has ever served up!

episode.title: PHOBIA FACTOR
