episode.description: Each camper is forced to face his or her worst fear. Beth surprises all when she turns out to be one fearless cookie, and Gwen and Trent bond as they help one another conquer their phobias.

episode.title: MEET THE SATURDAYS
episode.description: A family of adventure-seeking scientists fights to protect the world's weirdest creatures from the sinister V.V. Argost. Coming this fall to Cartoon Network.

episode.title: CRYPTID HUNTERS
episode.description: Uncover the hidden creatures known as cryptids, and meet the family that's trying to find them. The Secret Saturdays comes to Cartoon Network this fall.

episode.title: MC GOO  "YOU GO GOO"
episode.description: Goo lets her imagination run wild in a fast-paced music video.

episode.title: CLASS OF 3000 - "STUDY BUDDIES"
episode.description: Sunny and L'il D hit the books in the music video "Study Buddies."

episode.title: CLASS OF 3000 - "RAPUNZEL"
episode.description: Get down with Sunny and the Class of 3000 in the music video "Rapunzel."

episode.title: CLASS OF 3000 - "BEAST LOVE"
episode.description: Li'l D puts his drum skills to the test against a beast of an opponent.

episode.title: CLASS OF 3000 - "PHILLY PHIL, COME HOME"
episode.description: The Class of 3000 crew breaks it down in the music video "Philly Phil, Come Home."

episode.title: CLASS OF 3000 - "CLEAN UP"
episode.description: Li'l D keeps it fresh in the music video "Clean Up."

episode.title: CODE LYOKO ANIMATED MUSIC VIDEO
episode.description: Rock out with the Subdigitals and the heroes from "Code Lyoko."

episode.title: CLASS OF 3000 - "FARM SONG"
episode.description: Get down with Sunny and the Class of 3000 in the music video "Farm Song."

episode.title: CLASS OF 3000 - "LIFE WITHOUT MUSIC"
episode.description: Sunny and the kids from Westley show how terrible life would be without music in this Class of 3000 music video.

episode.title: CLASS OF 3000 - "THROWDOWN"
episode.description: All the kids from Westley join Sunny Bridges to throw down some of their coolest dance moves in this Class of 3000 music video.

episode.title: CLASS OF 3000 - "UFO NINJA"
episode.description: Sunny and the gang go ninja in a video that's out of this world.

episode.title: SAN DIEGO COMIC CON 2008
episode.description: Cartoon Network was at Comic Con this year. Check it out and for more, be sure to watch Toonami Jetstream's version in its Spotlight section.

episode.title: CHOWDER: I'M NOT YOUR BOYFRIEND REMIX
episode.description: Chowder expresses his true feelings for Panini.

episode.title: GAZPACHO'S
episode.description: Don't miss the great deals at Gazpacho's. It's food you can't find anywhere else!

episode.title: CARTOON NETWORK THARSDAYS
episode.description: Get your laughs every week on Cartoon Network THARSdays!

episode.title: NEW THURSDAY NIGHTS
episode.description: Thursdays are all-new for YOU, starting Thursday at 7:30 p.m. (e/p)!

episode.title: ELIJAH
episode.description: It's no ordinary morning when Cartoon Network characters jump out of the TV and into Elijah's rhymes.

episode.title: THE HIVES - "FALL IS JUST SOMETHING GROWN-UPS INVENTED."
episode.description: Check it out! It's the full-length version of the Hives music video.

episode.title: CHEESE QUEST
episode.description: Cheese gets a mouthful of video game adventure.

episode.title: OUT OF JIMMY'S HEAD RECAP
episode.description: Get the backstory on Jimmy Roberts and the gang from "Out of Jimmy's Head."

episode.title: FALL MUSIC VIDEO WITH LYRICS
episode.description: Sing along to "Fall Is Something Grown-ups Invented" by the Hives. Find out more about the Hives on the Fried Dynamite page!

episode.title: FALL MUSIC VIDEO
episode.description: Rock out to sounds of fall. It's "Fall Is Something Grown-ups Invented" by the Hives.

episode.title: THE FOOT BURN
episode.description: Don't let the foot burn ruin your adventures. Try Whale Kisses medicated foot cream. *Not available anywhere.

episode.title: CARE BEARS ON FIRE  EVERYBODY ELSE
episode.description: Do-It-Yourself kid rockers, Care Bears on Fire, sound off with their hit "Everybody Else."

episode.title: CARE BEARS ON FIRE  MYSPACE
episode.description: Care Bears on Fire rock out with their song "Myspace."

episode.title: TINY MASTERS OF TODAY  RADIO RIOT
episode.description: Tiny Masters of Today tear up the stage with their song "Radio Riot"

episode.title: TINY MASTERS OF TODAY  STICKIN' IT TO THE MAN
episode.description: Kid rockers, Tiny Masters of Today, stick it to the man.

episode.title: D.A.S. ANIMATED SERIES - SUN VAMPIRE
episode.description: The Dynamite Action Squad combines powers to knock the Sun Vampire's lights out.

episode.title: D.A.S.: ANIMATED SERIES  MUSCLE GOOSE
episode.description: Muscle Goose is on the loose and only Chicken Wizard can stop him. Who will win this fowl brawl?

episode.title: D.A.S.: ANIMATED SERIES- EL HEDOR
episode.description: El Gato Violento must save the world's toys from El Hedor's foul plot.

episode.title: DYNAMITE ACTION SQUAD ANIMATED SERIES  DENTAL VIKING
episode.description: Wülfborg 2072 is on a mission to stop the Dental Viking from spreading banan-o-grape flavored doom.

episode.title: MUSIC VIDEO BEHIND THE SCENES
episode.description: Go behind the scenes of the Fried Dynamite music video with Blake and the gang.

episode.title: THE MUSIC VIDEO
episode.description: Blake, Kamil and the gang bust out in song for their first music video.

episode.title: THE MUSIC VIDEO WITH LYRICS
episode.description: Can't understand what Blake is saying? You're in luck! Now you can sing along with the lyrics for Fried Dynamite's awesome new music video.

episode.title: BEN 10 - "SLEEPAWAY CAMPER"
episode.description: Max is snoring like crazy and it is keeping Ben awake! Now he must figure out a way to get to sleep!

episode.title: SQUIRREL BOY - "HANGING TOUGH"
episode.description: Things take a turn for the worse when Rodney comes home with a new poster for Andy's room.

episode.title: BEN 10 - "RADIO DAZED"
episode.description: Ben and Gwen can't take anymore of Max's music on the radio, so Ben goes Upgrade and mixes it up.

episode.title: SQUIRREL BOY - "TAKE ME TO YOUR FEEDER"
episode.description: Rodney decides Mr. J needs his help getting him into an exclusive birdwatching club.

episode.description: AD - McDonald's (R) Happy Meal (R) brought you the sneak peek first - now check out the full episode of Skunk Fu! - "The Art of Monkeying Around."

episode.description: AD - McDonald's (R) Happy Meal (R) brought you the sneak peek first - now check out the full episode of The Marvelous Misadventures of Flapjack - "Oh Brother."

episode.description: AD - McDonald's (R) Happy Meal (R) brought you the sneak peek first - now check out the full episode of The Marvelous Misadventures of Flapjack - "Mechanical Genie Island."

episode.description: Catch a brand-new episode of Skunk Fu this Thursday, September 11, at 4 p.m. (e/p). McDonald's (R) Happy Meal (R) presents this week's World Premiere Sneak Peek.

episode.description: AD - McDonald's (R) Happy Meal (R) brought you the sneak peek first - now check out the full episode of Ben 10: Alien Force - "Plumber's Helpers."
